Name: Main Controller
Description: ESP32-CAM module with integrated OV2640 camera for Wi-Fi streaming, processing, and control.

Name: Room Temp/Humidity Sensor
Product Name: DHT11 Temperature and Humidity Sensor Module
Description: Measures ambient temperature and humidity for environmental monitoring.

Name: Door Open Indicator LED
Description: Indicates system running status.

Name: AC Status Indicator LED
Description: Standard 5mm through-hole red LED for indicator purposes.

Name: Door Opening Servo
Description: Small and lightweight servo motor, commonly used for steering in small robots.

Name: Front Enclosure Panel
Description: Front panel for the smart room enclosure, allowing visibility for camera and LEDs. Made from transparent acrylic.

Name: Rear Enclosure Panel
Description: Rear panel for the smart room enclosure, solid ABS for structural integrity and component mounting.

Name: Top Enclosure Panel
Description: Top panel for the smart room enclosure.

Name: Bottom Enclosure Panel
Description: Bottom panel for the smart room enclosure.

Name: Left Enclosure Panel
Description: Left side panel for the smart room enclosure.

Name: Right Enclosure Panel
Description: Right side panel for the smart room enclosure, containing the small door mechanism.

Name: M3 Standoffs for Panels
Description: Used to connect enclosure panels at corners.

Name: M3 Screws for Panels
Description: Used with M3 standoffs to secure enclosure panels.

Name: ESP32-CAM Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket to securely mount the ESP32-CAM module to the internal chassis/rear panel.

Name: DHT11 Sensor Mount
Description: 3D-printed enclosure for the DHT11 sensor, allowing it to be mounted to an internal panel.

Name: Green LED Bezel Mount
Description: 3D-printed bezel to cleanly mount the green LED indicator flush with the front panel.

Name: Red LED Bezel Mount
Description: 3D-printed bezel to cleanly mount the red LED indicator flush with the front panel.

Name: Small Model Door
Description: A small, lightweight model door actuated by the SG90 servo, integrated into the right side panel.

Name: Upper Door Hinge
Description: Upper hinge component for the small model door, attaching it to the right enclosure panel.

Name: Lower Door Hinge
Description: Lower hinge component for the small model door, attaching it to the right enclosure panel.

Name: SG90 Servo Mount
Description: 3D-printed bracket to securely mount the SG90 servo motor to the inside of the right side panel.

Name: Servo Arm Door Adapter
Description: Custom 3D-printed adapter to connect the SG90 servo horn to the small model door for actuation.
